headline: Johnson & Johnson Reaches $230M Settlement With New York State To End Sale Of Opioids Nationwide
summary: On Saturday, Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) said it would end the manufacture and sale of opioids nationwide in a $230 million settlement with the New York state,

headline: Microsoft Says Its Customer Support Tools, Users' Information Were Exploited By SolarWinds Hackers
summary: On Friday, Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) said that hackers behind the SolarWinds attack had gained access to its customer service agent's device.

headline: Palantir Stock Crosses Resistance Level And Heads Higher. What's Next?
summary:
Palantir Technologies Inc. (NYSE: PLTR) shares are trading higher Friday as retail traders push the stock up.

Palantir Technologies is a well-known stock in Reddit’s Wall Street Bets community.

headline: Tesla To Recall Nearly 300,000 China-Made Vehicles To Update Its Autopilot Software
summary: According to the Chinese regulators, Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) will 'recall' nearly 300,000 China-made and imported vehicles.

headline: Shiba Inu Coin Might Become Next Nascar Car Logo
summary:
The 2021 Nascar season has featured a car with the Dogecoin logo of a Shiba Inu in several races.

A Voyager-sponsored car has also featured the names of several cryptocurrencies on the car.
